title: Liminal introduces HSM Vaults for digital asset holdings
message_html: Liminal introduces HSM Vaults for digital asset holdings ...
snippet: Liminal Custody, a secure digital wallet and custody infrastructure platform, today announced the launch of Liminal HSM Vaults, a new institutional-grade solution designed to meet the security, control, and compliance demands of banks and enterprises entering the digital asset market.

title: Nasdaq, Talos target collateral bottleneck in institutional tokenization push
message_html: Nasdaq, Talos target collateral bottleneck in institutional tokenization push ...
snippet: Nasdaq is wiring its collateral and surveillance systems into Talos’s institutional trading stack to target a $35 billion “trapped” collateral problem.
